untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) correlation coefficient calculation between two series, (2) custom divergence indicator not in allowed list, (3) dynamic threshold generation based on percentile-ranked historical divergence magnitude with correlation adjustment factor. These require multi-series statistical computations and custom indicator logic beyond the scope of single-indicator threshold rules. The 60th percentile threshold and correlation multiplier are parameterized but cannot be operationalized with allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal describes a sophisticated multi-asset normalization framework that requires: dynamic correlation calculations, a proprietary divergence indicator, percentile-based adaptive thresholds, and cross-pair calibration. The allowed indicator set does not support correlation calculations or custom divergence metrics. Substituted placeholder entry/exit using moving averages as mean-reversion proxy, but this does not capture the core logic of pair-specific threshold calibration or divergence-based entry signals.
